other_observers: None; Original observer. Observed later the same day by Cole Wild.
description: A pale gull, approximately equal in size to Thayer's Gull and small American Herring Gull. Head and breast mostly white, with dark eye and mostly dark bill with lighter base. Pale gray-brown markings on belly. Pinkish legs and feet. Pale gray mantle, somewhat mottled. Wings mottled very pale brownish-gray with darker outer primaries and secondaries. Almost white inner secondaries. Pale brown tail. Blocky head and fairly heavy bill for this species suggest male gender.Behaviors: Flying, standingCall: nonePlumage: immature
photographer: Photographer: NKomar, N Komar, N Komar, N Komar, N Komar
